_description: SRE Agent that filters noisy Azure Monitor alerts using a 15-minute transient check — auto-closes self-resolving alerts and only creates ServiceNow tickets (via MCP) for real, persistent issues.
_prerequisites: Azure subscription with at least one resource group to monitor
Application Insights and/or Log Analytics workspace
ServiceNow instance with MCP server enabled and API access

appInsightsId.ask: Application Insights resource ID (or leave blank)

appInsightsAppId.ask: Application Insights App ID / GUID (or leave blank)

lawId.ask: Log Analytics workspace resource ID (or leave blank)

snowInstance.ask: ServiceNow instance name (e.g. dev181595 — the subdomain in https://dev181595.service-now.com)

existingUamiId.ask: Existing UAMI resource ID (leave blank to create new)

existingAgentAppInsightsId.ask: Existing App Insights resource ID for agent telemetry (leave blank to create new)

githubAppClientId.ask: GitHub App Client ID for BYO App auth (starts with Iv..., leave blank for OAuth)

privateKeySecretUri.ask: Key Vault key URI for GitHub App private key (https://<vault>.vault.azure.net/keys/<name>)
